title: Competition Demystified
author: Brent Beshore
subline: Five forces. One game theory. A way to win.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- Five radiating arrows = Porter's Five Forces. 'Competitors' arrow is RED and longest. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1000)" fill="none" stroke-linecap="square">
    <g stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="3">
      <line x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="-700"/>
      <polyline points="-22,-668 0,-700 22,-668"/>
    </g>
    <text x="0" y="-740" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="18" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.18em">RIVALS</text>
    <g stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.7">
      <line x1="0" y1="0" x2="540" y2="-300"/>
      <polyline points="525,-273 540,-300 514,-308"/>
    </g>
    <text x="560" y="-310" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="16" font-weight="500" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="0.18em">BARRIERS</text>
    <g stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.55">
      <line x1="0" y1="0" x2="700" y2="100"/>
      <polyline points="680,79 700,100 680,121"/>
    </g>
    <text x="720" y="115" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="16" font-weight="500" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="0.18em">SUPPLIERS</text>
    <g stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.55">
      <line x1="0" y1="0" x2="500" y2="460"/>
      <polyline points="482,440 500,460 522,444"/>
    </g>
    <text x="520" y="475" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="16" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">BUYERS</text>
    <g stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.55">
      <line x1="0" y1="0" x2="-640" y2="100"/>
      <polyline points="-622,124 -640,100 -622,76"/>
    </g>
    <text x="-660" y="115" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="16" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">SUBSTITUTES</text>
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="10" fill="#ffffff"/>
  </g>
  <text x="800" y="1280" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.4em">PORTER · 1979</text>
</svg>
rationale: Five radiating arrows from a central white dot — Porter's Five Forces. 'Rivals' is RED and longest, declaring it the dominant force. The other four are ash/graphite, shorter, in different directions. Title is heavy 280px mixed-case at bottom, subline above, brand mark in lower-right. The composition is a strategy board pinned to a wall.
